nodes.label: Freeverb
nodes.description: JUCE Reverb (Freeverb-style): 8 comb filters + 4 allpass filters, 100% wet

nodes.label: Size
nodes.description: Room size (0-1): controls reverb tail length

nodes.label: Damping
nodes.description: High-frequency damping (0-1): controls brightness of reverb tail

nodes.label: Width
nodes.description: Stereo width (0-1). NOTE: currently sets damping due to a bug in setWidth()
